pr.title: Revive pre-3D disabled unit tests with 3D-aware main-board test infrastructure
pr.body:
A large portion of unit coverage had been disabled during the 2D→3D transition because tests assumed flat 8x8 offsets, legacy EPD shape, and class-level ignores. This change reactivates that coverage by standardizing tests on explicit main-board (level 7) semantics and replacing brittle 2D assumptions.

- **Scope restored**
  - Removed class-level `Ignore` gates from:
    - `AttackDeltaTests`
    - `MoveTests`
    - `PositionTests`
    - `SearchDataTests`
  - Replaced commented/disabled legacy coverage in `AttackTests` with active 3D-compatible cases.

- **3D-safe test foundation**
  - Added shared helpers in `WinAmyTests/TestHelpers.*` to normalize legacy test intent onto main-board offsets:
    - `MainBoardOffset`, `MainBoardCoord`
    - `MakeMainBoardMove`, `MakeMainBoardPromotion`
    - `CreatePositionFromLegacyMainEPD`
  - Centralized legacy EPD handling (including en-passant translation) so tests remain concise while targeting correct 3D coordinates.

- **Suite migrations**
  - **Move/Position/SearchData**: migrated move construction and board access from flat `a1..h8` assumptions to main-board-aware helpers.
  - **AttackDelta**: replaced brittle 2D expected-count checks with 3D-valid invariants and reference-based sliding/leaping assertions.
  - **Attack**: revived disabled attack-map maintenance coverage (`AtkSet/AtkClr/Recalc`) and adjusted table assertions to validate 3D-validity instead of fixed 2D layouts.

- **Stability fixes in tests**
  - Updated `SearchDataTests` to avoid stack overflow from large `CSearchData` stack allocation by using heap allocation in test code.

```cpp
// New test usage pattern (main-board aware)
PositionGuard p(CreatePositionFromLegacyMainEPD("4k3/8/8/3pP3/8/8/8/4K3 w - d6"));
CMove move = MakeMainBoardMove(e5, d6, M_ENPASSANT);
Assert::IsTrue(p.get()->LegalMove(move));
```
pr.author: Copilot
